zh.lifeSummary: Major Phillip O'Sullivan是Owen Donal O’Sullivan和Joanne Elizabeth Browne的兒子，出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里阿爾迪亞。他和Johanna McCarthy至少有6個兒子。他去世於1691年在法國波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯羅姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Major Phillip O'Sullivan是Owen Donal O’Sullivan和Joanne Elizabeth Browne的儿子，出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克里阿爾迪亞。他和Johanna McCarthy至少有6个儿子。他去世于1691年在法国波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯羅姆。

nameMeanings.name: O'Sullivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Declan, Kieran, Cathal, Dermot, Eamon, Fergus, Grainne, Seamus.
Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Súileabháin ‘descendant of Súileabhán’, a personal name from súil ‘eye’ + dubh ‘dark’ + the diminutive suffix -án. Compare Sullivan .

variants.name: Sullivan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Donal, James Patrick, Michael Patrick, Aileen, Brigid, Paddy, Siobhan, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Parnell.
Irish (Cork and Kerry): shortened form of   O'Sullivan  .

nameMeanings.name: Phillip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Philip , in part a reflection of the surname, which is usually spelled Phillips.

historicEvents.title: Edict of Nantes
historicEvents.description: Under the rule of Henry IV of France the Edict of Nantes was issued giving the people some religious liberty. The edict brought an end to the religious wars that were going on at the time.
Accession of James I. Surrender of Hugh O'Neill. Enforcement of English Law in Ireland.
Reigns of Louis XIII and Louis XIV. Royal power at its peak. France dominates Europe, French culture spreads. Start of large-scale sea trade.

Great Catholic-Gaelic rebellion for return of lands, later joined by Old English Catholics in Ireland. Under leadership of Irish chieftain, Rory O'More, conspiracy was formed to seize Dublin and expel the English. English settlers were driven out of Ulster. Catholics hold 59% of land in Ireland.

The Protestant Lord Protector of England, Oliver Cromwell, landed at Dublin. His troops killed 2,000 men. A great part of lands in Munster, Leinster and Ulster (Drogheda and Wexford) was confiscated and divided among the English soldiers.
Over 6,000 Irish boys and women sold as slaves since England gained control of Jamaica.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

en.lifeSummary: Major Phillip O'Sullivan was born in Ardea, County Kerry, Ireland as the son of Owen Donal O’Sullivan and Joanne Elizabeth Browne. He had at least 6 sons with Johanna McCarthy. He died in 1691, in Rom, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Major Phillip O'Sullivan est né à Ardea, County Kerry, Irlande, fils de Owen Donal O’Sullivan et Joanne Elizabeth Browne. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Johanna McCarthy. Il est décédé en 1691, à Rom, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Major Phillip O'Sullivan wurde in Ardea, County Kerry, Irland, als Sohn von Owen Donal O’Sullivan und Joanne Elizabeth Browne geboren. Er hatte mit Johanna McCarthy mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1691 in Rom, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Major Phillip O'Sullivan è nato il nel Ardea, County Kerry, Irlanda come figlio di Owen Donal O’Sullivan e Joanne Elizabeth Browne. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Johanna McCarthy. Morì nel 1691, nel Rom, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Major Phillip O'Sullivanはアイルランドコウントイ ケリーアルディーでOwen Donal O’SullivanとJoanne Elizabeth Browneの息子として生まれた。彼はJohanna McCarthyとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1691年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツデウクス-スevレスロムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Major Phillip O'Sullivan(은)는 아일랜드 카운티 케리 아디에서 Owen Donal O’Sullivan(와)과 Joanne Elizabeth Browne의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Johanna McCarthy(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1691년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 데우스-스e브레스 롬에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Major Phillip O'Sullivan nasceu em Ardea, County Kerry, Irlanda filho de Owen Donal O’Sullivan e Joanne Elizabeth Browne. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Johanna McCarthy. Ele faleceu em 1691, em Rom, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Major Phillip O'Sullivan родился в местности ардеа, коунти кирри, Ирландия. Его родителей звали Owen Donal O’Sullivan и Joanne Elizabeth Browne. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Johanna McCarthy. Он умер в 1691 г. в местности ром, деукс-сeвресь, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Major Phillip O'Sullivan nació en Ardea, County Kerry, Irlanda como hijo de Owen Donal O’Sullivan y Joanne Elizabeth Browne. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Johanna McCarthy. Murió en 1691, en Rom, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.
